_meta.note: CLINICAL QA SIGN-OFF REQUIRED before production. Templates must be reviewed by a licensed clinician. No template may contain failure framing ('you failed', 'streak reset', 'you lost'). See CLAUDE.md Rule #4.

templates.text: You're here. That matters. When you're ready, we can look at today together.
This moment doesn't define your journey. Compassion for yourself is the next step.
It's okay to struggle. Reach out when you're ready — we're here.
One moment at a time. You are not alone in this.
Be gentle with yourself. Recovery is not a straight line.
Every step forward — no matter how small — is still a step. We're glad you're here.
Hard moments are part of the path. You don't have to navigate this alone.
Take a breath. You reached out, and that is the first courageous step.
